subcodes.first_line: O thou who circlest round the gathering-place of the Concourse on High! Among the greatest gifts of God in this dispensation is the quickening of man [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طائف حول مطاف ملا اعلی از اعظم مواهب الهیه انبعاث انسانست در این عصر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
